haikus.theme: National Roast Leg of Lamb Day
haikus.haiku:
Herbs dance in warm breeze,
Succulent scents weave through time,
Feasts shared, hearts aglow.
Happy #NationalRoastLegOfLambDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Keys unlock the glow,
Colorful codes dance in light,
Secure joy we share.
Happy #WorldPasswordDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Melody's embrace,
Notes like stars in evening light,
Joyful hearts unite.
#HappyBirthdayJohannesBrahms from @ClamBakeSanta

Sunlight through the leaves,
Words dance on the gentle breeze,
Joy in every verse.
#HappyBirthdayRobertBrowning from @ClamBakeSanta
